$comment: Design token file for the Date Picker Dates component
$description: Individual date cell in the calendar grid. Has three primary states (Default, Selected, Disabled) and range-specific variants (Range middle, Range Start, Range End). Selected state renders as a filled circle. Range-mode fills the cell background and adds a half-pill connector on start/end edges.

size.description: 44px — fixed width and height for every date cell- lg - 44px

default.description: 4px — rounded square for default and disabled states

selected.description: Fully circular pill for the selected state circle

default.description: Light gray background for unselected interactive dates- gray/100 - #f2f4f7

selected.description: Dark primary blue fill for the selected date circle- primary/blue-900 - #00359e

range.description: Light blue fill for dates that fall within a selected range- primary/blue-100 - #d1e0ff

typography.description: 13px Medium, 18px line-height — date number inside the cell

selected.description: White date number on the dark selected circle- gray/0 - #ffffff

range.description: Date number color for in-range dates- gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Muted color for disabled and out-of-month dates- gray/300 - #d0d5dd

size.description: Diameter of the small dot marking today's date

default.description: #155eef — blue dot shown at top-right of today's cell in default state

selected.description: White dot shown above the selected circle when today is selected- gray/0 - #000000

offset.description: Inset from top and right edges for the today dot in default state

background.description: Half-pill shown behind the selected circle at range start (left-open) and range end (right-open) to visually connect to the range band- primary/blue-100 - #d1e0ff
